articles.title: Bigger, Badder, Browner: Poorna Jagannathan Tells Us About Deli Boys Season 2
articles.summary: From crime boss to caretaker, Deli Boys’ Lucky Auntie remains one of TV’s most fascinating characters Poorna Jagannathan breaks down Lucky’s evolution in Season 2, the challenges of dating as a “single mom” figure, and that explosive season finale.

articles.title: ‘Made To Appear’: Viraj Khanna’s Textile Art Questions Privilege, Desire, & Digital Validation
articles.summary: What happens when social media stops documenting life and starts shaping it? In Made To Appear, Viraj Khanna and Brian Robertson explore identity, performance, memory, and authenticity through intricate textile-based works at GR Gallery, New York.

articles.title: Deepak Thomas Created A Board Game Based On Mumbai's Chaotic Everyday Commute
articles.summary: Simbly City Is The Board Game Born From Navigating Mumbai What started as a playful way to teach the creator's wife about a city has evolved into a community-driven board game about movement, strategy, and connection.
